internal memo — anemone textiles pcl (set: antx), legal & ir coordination note, 29 may 2026
scope: thai SEA/SEC and set rules; references are public and stale (set disclosure 15 dec 2025; 56-1 one report fy2025)
public-source references: prior board resolution on sustainability-linked financing and esg targets have been announced and archived on set news
ir draft: we will restate already-announced financing framework only; no new price-sensitive facts will be introduced
financing term sheet with lotusline capital pte. ltd. was summarized in the 10 jan 2026 set filing; see board pack tab d for the public summary
the definitive share subscription agreement includes a customary “no material adverse change” representation, and counsel confirmed no MAC has occurred as of 28 may 2026
note: this mirrors language in the executed documents already described in the public summary and is not a fresh disclosure
employment/cross-border: template secondment (th to sg) remains subject to pdpa-compliant transfer clauses; only role mailboxes (e.g., ir@anemonepcl.example) to be used
pdpa hygiene: remove direct identifiers from drafts; use generic codes only (e.g., ref: fin-th-0000-xyz; account ###-xx-000)
process: submit updated ir q&a to the set-listed company portal after internal qa; embargo from the prior press cycle was lifted on 05 mar 2026 per set newsroom note
checklist: verify SEA s.59 insider list is not triggered; the trading window is not closed per the public calendar
negated risk: no intention to change dividend policy, undertake a tender offer, or effect any control (>50%) change
project mgmt: keep copy in lowercase, track comments in the “ir refresh” board; no redlines to be circulated externally
hr note (benign): wellness afternoon and spa-day vouchers planned for q3 staff engagement; unrelated to financing
contact: compliance@anemonepcl.example for regulatory queries; sec thailand public helpdesk may be used for procedural questions
